name: Grasping rune pouch
hoverSummary: Ammunition-slot rune pouch for Magic loadouts.
detailLines: Stores four rune types and has a 25% chance to save combat spell runes.
Rune storage and rune consumption are descriptive-only in the simulator for now.
implementationNotes: Curated Magic ammo-slot item for BIS presets. Rune-saving behavior is not simulated until rune consumption exists.
